endpoints.name: The Bing Spell Check API lets you perform contextual grammar and spell checking. Bing has developed a web-based spell-checker that leverages machine learning and statistical machine translation to dynamically train a constantly evolving and highly contextual algorithm. The spell-checker is based on a massive corpus of web searches and documents.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{MICROSOFT_API_KEY}} with your MICROSOFT API KEY.
